uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: field1=3.6 V, field2=50 %, field3=25 °C) and mapped to vocabulary keys (field1->battery, field2->air.relativeHumidity, field3->air.temperature). Upstream has no examples in air-temperature-and-humidity-codec.yaml.

uplink.description: Negative temperature (two's complement): battery 3.1 V, humidity 70.0 %, temperature -12.0 °C
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input exercising the temp >= 0x8000 two's-complement branch; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle: field1=3.1 V, field2=70 %, field3=-12 °C).
Synthetic; upstream decoder has no length guard and would read undefined bytes (NaN). Our codec rejects payloads shorter than 7 bytes.
